---
name: testing-validation
description: Design tests, validate behavior against design, and classify failures by layer.
---

## Purpose
Prove intended behavior with tests and validation evidence.

## When to use
- When writing or updating tests.
- When validating behavior against design.
- When classifying failures from checks or reviews.

## Do
1. Test the behavior the design requires.
2. Cover happy path, edge cases, and failure modes.
3. Distinguish design, code, test, and environment failures.
4. Keep validation evidence factual.
